focalElement: heavy obsidian archway with Embertide-of-Power motif at apex
secondaryElement: ruby-banded pillars wrapped in blackened thorned ivy, two LIT iron torch sconces at base
notes: Shared across every Region Encounter altar — not boss-specific.
Raster is a cutout overlay with transparent interior; the stained-glass CSS pane shows through.
Torches are LIT in the raster with baked-in flame glow — the CSS ember pulse on the pane still animates separately.
Embertide-of-Power chosen for the Region variant to signal the Adult/region-boss tier (power ~ the escalation).

Alpha channel cleaned in resolution-bpa via `scripts/gen-altar-frames-v2.py --mode=cleanup`, which strips the bright-pure-grayscale opaque residue (checker-pattern transparency-indicator pixels that leaked through u-10c's BFS flood-fill). Cleared ~26% of the raster — the region variant had far more residue than the wild variant because the heavier obsidian ornament occluded more flood-fill paths. The cleanup preserves legitimate ornament (saturated colors and dark stone/shadow) and targets only the checker signature (R≈G≈B, value≥175, fully opaque).
